title: WALDWERK Mortar and Pestle - Mortar and Pestle Set with Anti-Scratch Oak Wood Base - Mortar with Extra Large Pestle Made of Natural Granite - Large Mortar and Pestle - Ideal for Guacamole
description:
About this item
🌿 BEAUTIFUL DESIGN - the high-quality oak wood base protects your kitchen shelf from scratches while using your mortar. Moreover, the noble oak wood combines with the natural granite to give a jewelry look in your kitchen!
🌿 BOMBPROOF STAND - the extra-wide oak wood base keeps your WALDWERK mortar securely to give you a fun-filled grinding process with no mess!
🌿 EXTRA LONG PESTLE - to make chopping as easy and comfortable as possible for you. This ensures that your hand does not collide with the edge of the mortar.
🌿 100% NATURAL - granite is one of the oldest and hardest rocks in the world. It hardly absorbs any water and is super easy to clean. It is also absolutely harmless to health!
reviews_5s:
This mortar and pestle is a solid addition to my kitchen. The granite matches my countertop well, and the acacia wood base adds a nice contrast. The wood base also helps dampen the sound, which is a thoughtful touch.

The build quality feels sturdy, and I don’t have to worry about it cracking or breaking when grinding spices or smashing tougher ingredients. I went with the smaller size, which is ideal for grinding spices and saves counter space. If you’re planning to make larger batches of pesto or sauces, the bigger option might be worth considering. Overall, it’s a practical and well-designed tool and is worth it for those who want to grind whole spices.I’d been using a small mortar & pestle set and finally decided to upgrade. This is a really nice set. Great size and quality. I love the weight of the pestle. The wood base is also a great option. This is definitely worth it if it’s something you use regularly.Functionality and beauty rolled into one. I keep this in my kitchen in plane view. It draws many compliments.Wow! What a beautiful Mortar and Pestle, it is quite large and heavy, I’d say it’s about 7 pounds worth of mortar and pestle.
It is easy to use, I love the fact that you can slide it without scratching the surface of what it’s sitting on. And with a little effort on your part, it will grind whatever you put in it to the texture you’re looking for.
And ladies for those of y’all who do not use this type of equipment, it truly is a piece of art, It sits inside a lovely wooden base with an inlay for the mortar.
I currently have it displayed in my dinning room, too beautiful to hide away.Great quality, heavy, easy to use, and easy to clean! First used… made fresh guacamole! Highly recommended!I really like the wooden base design. This makes it very stable to grind spices with as much force as you like without it moving on you. Great quality, hreat design and nice looking. I recommend it.This is exactly what my wife wanted. She loves it and it is so well madeThis grinder cost more than I wanted to spend but since I'm a one and done person, I went for it and I and I'm so glad I did!
This grinder is superior to what I imagined it would be (and I had high expectations). This grinder makes such a statement that it actually feels like a piece art!
If you make this purchase, you won't regret it!
A great wedding gift in my opinion!Solid well made and the ribbing inside helps grind anything. Often need a spoon to removed ground dried spices, but those who don’t mind tilting it can get the ground spices, and those with stronger hands can pick it up and bring it to your pot…buy this once for life. Great value. Easy to use. Takes a grip to pick it up. Also the ribs inside let you get the “grip” on spices. The wooden bottom prevents table scratches and the granite itself is impervious to scratching.

Enjoy this daily !Fantastic
reviews_1s:
The Waldwerk Mortar and Pestle ordered is beautiful and heavy. I will keep. BUT The ad misleads Amazon customers. It is NOT extra large. It does not even hold two cups of anything. I paid $49.90 for this set and feels like way to much money. Additionally, instructions say to dry washed mortar in a drying rack before placing it on the wood base. I am writing this review to help some other Amazon customer from making a poor purchase choice. The review may not even get posted.I don't know whether their version of extra large is different than mine but this is NOT extra large. I'm not sure it will even hold one avocado. I will be returning.The mortar and pestle are really nice; but the reason i gave a 1 rating is that I bought it January 12 and return is February 13. I bought it as a gift, didn’t open the package and presented the gift today, March 4. I had to hold it because of the birthday date. When opened, the pestle was broken on the end and the Manufacturer GLUED the broken piece back on. Unacceptable! And the 30-day return is past. What can I do? I would like to have the pestle replaced. Thank you
Everyone, if you buy a gift ahead of being able to present it, open it and inspect it BEFORE return policy passed.Seems like a case of form over factor. The bowl of the pestle has grooves in it that immediately captures anything that you were grinding. This makes it very difficult to clean, and if you were working with anything precise from an input standpoint, the yield from your grinding will be much less.Title speaks for itself. Used only a handful of times and the pestle broke. Absolute garbage quality. You will be better off getting something else.I got this bowl and it is chipped on the top of itPaket kam prompt. leider ist der Stößel beschädigt, daher zurück. Werde neu bestellen und hoffe, dass dann alles in Ordnung istDieser Mörser kam ohne!!! die Eichenholzbasis bei uns an. Schade, hatte uns auf den Bildern sehr gut gefallen. Ging sofort wieder zurück.Ich habe den Mörser gekauft weil die Bewertungen so gut waren. Ich kann es kein Stück nachvollziehen. Er wirkt für mich eher von minderer Qualität. Ich dachte dieses Produkt hebt sich von den Billigeren Konkurrenten ab. Dem war wohl nicht so. Sehr SchadeSieht sehr hochwertig aus, habe es aber nicht benutzt, da der penetrante Gestank nach Erbrochenem nicht auszuhalten war. Dachte erst, es läge an der Verpackung - die übrigens absolut chic aussah- und habe sie direkt entsorgt. Leider konnte ich den Geruch an der Schale und an dem Holzteller weder durch lüften noch durch Essig entfernen. Habe dann heute die Rücksendung eingeleitet 😢
